allow: PowerShell(cd "d:\\WordSpaceForAi\\Decentralized management\\client"; $output = npx react-scripts build 2>&1; $errors = $output | Select-String -Pattern "Failed to compile|Error|error|Module not found" -Context 0,2; if \($errors\) { Write-Host "BUILD FAILED:"; $errors | ForEach-Object { Write-Host $_.Line } } else { Write-Host "BUILD SUCCESS" })

PowerShell($token = \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/auth/login" -Method Post -Body '{"username":"finance1","password":"finance1"}' -ContentType "application/json"\).token; $headers = @{Authorization = "Bearer $token"}; Write-Host "=== 部门树 ==="; \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/departments/tree" -Headers $headers | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5\); Write-Host "=== 用户列表\(含部门\) ==="; \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/users" -Headers $headers | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 3\))

PowerShell($login = @{username='finance1';password='finance1'} | ConvertTo-Json; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/auth/login" -Method Post -Body $login -ContentType "application/json"; $token = $r.token; $users = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/users" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"}; Write-Host "finance1 获取用户列表成功，共 $\($users.data.Count\) 条")
